name: Pump.fun Watch Agent
description: Pump.fun and PumpSwap-style watcher template for launch signals, risk labels, and mock/gated intent previews without live trading by default.
degenPitch: Watch the launch chaos, keep the buy button gated.
whatItDoes: Watches launch-style feeds and token risk signals.
Emits paid launch alerts and risk notes.
Keeps Pump.fun live trading out until adapter tests and gates exist.
notInBetaScope: Direct Pump.fun trading before adapter gate
cursorPrompt: Build a Pump.fun Watch Agent with DNA x402. Watch launch-style feeds, sell receipt-gated alerts, create mock/gated intents only, and keep live trading disabled until adapter gate and client-side signing exist.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Pump.fun Watch Agent with DNA x402. Watch launch-style feeds, sell receipt-gated alerts, create mock/gated intents only, and keep live trading disabled until adapter gate and client-side signing exist.
receiptProofBehavior: No live Pump.fun submit path runs by default.
